segments.text: The sons of Judah: Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

footnotes: Carmi: also called, Chelubai or Caleb

segments.text: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren: and his mother called his name Jabez, saying,
Because I bare him with sorrow.
segments.speaker: Jabez's Mother

segments.text: Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may not grieve me!
segments.speaker: Jabez

segments.text: And God granted him that which he requested.

footnotes: Oh…: Heb. If thou wilt, etc

segments.text: The sons of Simeon were, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, and Shaul:
And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.
